name: codeverse
description: A collaborative browser IDE with code execution, AI assistance, version recovery, publishing, and interactive algorithm visualization.
author: Ayush Kumar

scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix client && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.verify: npm run audit:repo && npm run test && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run audit:release && npm run build
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run test:e2e
